name: EMILY's List
subject: Heard about EMILY's Beach Bag?
body:
|
---
| | [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74519/706315818/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170616_email_BeachBag?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e7451a/706315818/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170616_email_BeachBag?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e7451b/706315818/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170616_email_BeachBag?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74515/706315818/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170616_email_BeachBag?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74516/706315818/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170616_email_BeachBag?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact")

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 11:59PM HT June 23, 2017. Enter by contributing [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74517/706315818/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170616_email_BeachBag?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact"), or click [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74510/706315818/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170616_email_BeachBagContest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact") to enter without contributing. Five (5) winners will each receive the following prize: One (1) "Run like a girl" tote bag, one (1) pack of four (4) Women's History buttons, one (1) sheet of EMILY's List flash tattoos, one (1) pocket journal, one (1) "Resist. Hydrate. Repeat." metal water bottle, one (1) EMILY's List beach towel, one (1) copy of "Deception" by Selena Montgomery, and one (1) copy of "Capitol Offense" by Barbara Mikulski. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74511/706315818/VEsP/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/pages/entry/emilys-list-beach-bag-sweepstakes-official-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=9+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: EMILY's List, 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036.

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74512/706315818/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=10+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e74513/706315818/VEsHBA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7acf/24c69fd9/d88340b8/18e7450c/706315818/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact&source=WQEFE629N_digital_email_20170621_BeachBagStopMotion_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Josh Mandel
subject: The next state on the Democrats' target list...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
Peter, can you please help out? | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42928581:sEiB352Np:m:1:1566067595:54C8840F9DA1A8243A666FB7A71FF3D4:r)
---
Peter,

The Democrats are reeling from their major loss in Georgia and are now focusing on their next target state: **Ohio**.

Ohio is always a battleground for the Democrats and they are more amped up than ever before to keep their beloved, Sherrod Brown, in the Senate.

Peter, the Democrats just spent a whopping 40 million in Georgia for a Congressional race -- which means there is NO telling how much they are willing to spend against our campaign for Senate.

I'm emailing you today because next week is the final week of June and it also means the final week of our End of Quarter goals. Now, more than ever before it is critical we meet our fundraising goals. **If we miss the mark next week our campaign will be viewed as a failure and we cannot allow that to happen.**

Peter, I'll be checking our donor list many times over the next week and I hope I'll see your name. It would mean the world to me to have your support.

| [** Yes, Josh! I can chip in!
Donate Now >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42928581:sEiB352Np:m:1:1566067595:54C8840F9DA1A8243A666FB7A71FF3D4:r)
---

Thanks,

Josh Mandel

**[P.S. Your donation - of $5, $15, $25, $50 or more - will make a huge impact and will help us reach our goal. Please, Peter, I need your support. I hope I can count on you.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42928581:sEiB352Np:m:1:1566067595:54C8840F9DA1A8243A666FB7A71FF3D4:r)**

[ ** Yes, Josh! I can chip in!
Donate Now >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42928581:sEiB352Np:m:1:1566067595:54C8840F9DA1A8243A666FB7A71FF3D4:r)
---

| Paid for by Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc.
145 East Rich Street, Suite 100
Columbus, OH 43215
---

Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DoD or Service Branch.

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
1600 Daily Everything White House for 6/22/2017. |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4fbb92f8ca294273b652fca1b46fa10a31dd0364ebb4c9bb6b46f83df77ef20ef075a23c2f22778ca2a77514acee23c022

Obamacare is failing the American people. Without action to repeal and replace Obamacare, Americans are stuck with higher costs, more taxes, and fewer choices. The trend of bad news for Obamacare is continuing - Americans need relief now.

Today's Events

9:30 AM: Vice President Pence delivers the keynote address at the Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC) Legislative Day

11:00 AM: President Trump participates in the American Leadership in Emerging Technology Event

1:00 PM: Vice President Pence delivers remarks at the Wilson Center

3:00 PM: President Trump meets with the International Olympic Committee

7:15 PM: President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump host the Congressional Picnic

Photo of the Day

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f6f22f7e6ad36bd1ef55b588b5df0097cdbe83c2d68b7b7eb3120f66f4ba0f1334dbe0ac8fe21848ec397bdc27fd80c15

President Donald J. Trump | June 21, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY

FACT: The American people know a bad deal when they see one. The most recent data shows that around
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f2e27cfd66ac67ba1a8a8fcbd115e7fdbbc755a80c4d735f68d79d27e1aa7ed38b0796f61a7d0bd562c56eb2d0dda9ba4
6.5 million Americans paid $3 billion in penalties to the IRS rather than buy unaffordable Obamacare plans.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f7aa59c36a132e619a2ac81587d7eae8e25ff0478b9c9f6945cf5016e4949c611bdab6f6dc683eeb7b175a55992dd2344

WHITE HOUSE UPDATES

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f8a9dad9d456971e4895bf702f13fb488b4d71fb5a240fc38cbca2d82118335c7745b79e6a92361d1fee101ac7b554941

Yesterday, President Trump visited Cedar Rapids, Iowa,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4fbc4b6d3129ef893fec530216fde6019b3900fd700c4d3b079eec01b39049d32ee10f5f8763e281fc26570f9055e3d7c4
where he gave remarks about empowering America’s farmers and protecting our Nation’s proud farming legacy.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f37453db3fe8e18008ef07402ee1329babe28316c8c58db30aaa28b56ef11c040907f074261522f834d836472b6f3e22f

Yesterday, Vice President Pence
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4feb7aee863c9ca04793cfb41b9372d6ab8920d25d506b64162b79bac0613e36d4b7e3a0d75d295f34c3573a0c94727c10
delivered remarks at the National Summit on Crime Reduction and Public Safety.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4fe5c2678a0c5f83542aedcd192a0bd4c4790c92b8a40ee4685c8e926178121c063426409853fd1f11384066e00ba540a6

Yesterday, Secretary of Health and Human Services Tom Price, M.D.,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f2dfef82e383b02edc292b9bb1df042a94681c532962646eea628ce042392fb7727f690e52fd863b5c7c2b6fe3f8089fc
met with individuals who are facing lack of choice because of Obamacare.

Yesterday, President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f3f7bd5d0b357dbda38aef539dcffdbf635af6c068173b6a00d41f9e290d7e69014dd0e846551ddc8eb297de50dd9727b
held a meeting with cybersecurity and energy sector representatives.

The application period for the Fall 2017 White House Internship Program closes this Friday, June 23. Interested applicants can
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f039c3c6bf8a20f9887f9fde25d45468169e655986ddd5c6e14b281ab762b5e5e56f1e6ea06f3eefaf51ff64802dead1e
apply here.

What We Are Reading

"In order for us to expand prosperity and extend economic opportunity to more Americans, we must remain on the cutting edge. This means that government at all levels must focus on removing barriers to innovation and ensuring that technological advances aren’t strangled by bureaucratic red tape."
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f787a53a60b09d0f7cb8937b2dd6f9ff7b2eae829d774034ca48684b7544d8e376e0048798546d0a71853bf59d864eab6
FCC Chairman Ajit Pai in New Hampshire Union Leader

"The White House is gathering technology leaders on Thursday to discuss how the industry aims to drive economic growth in emerging technology areas like wireless broadband and drones."
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4fca7d7ff8a0128e7205c1ee0c57084a029457384a240f214277ee5a25a16594223c87a27e4216617e33db976f88fd6008
The Hill

"..the nation’s second-largest health insurer announced Wednesday it plans to pull out of ObamaCare exchanges in Indiana and Wisconsin next year -- a move that fueled GOP calls on Capitol Hill to upend the law."
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f782b590ce1c0754910d7de09cd7693ac740d36cbb24a74dc7c83014e972eff3fee23de2070075526620ec98744b9d4a2
Fox News

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4f10565ce4aabfd2985a755e44ad1979ea1c1327bef797a43e5e8300fd6ed822d436d7eebb5a3db7016cfc47302c9e5120
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec6d2b4158b51d4ff0c31d13a0d1f0bc89bb3732701752795e0f2522999c6acd1187fd053b415d6503aec74d6a5ceb13941f6d6ad962df47
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d419b3753f9ab3734cb9e45fdfbc291f0e20baf8bda8c8bd8217354a2e6a576baa9dad6c9c67d8840f10f452bc892f4107
Unsubscribe

name: Tom Perez
subject: BREAKING: Our new health care ad
body:
We need your help to save affordable health care.
---
**Now that we've seen the Senate GOP's secret bill, we're launching a new ad to hold Republicans accountable on health care. Chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us keep it on the air and keep getting the word out about the GOP's health care repeal:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccf6/4067b0a/341610b62/7e681ac4/1172304663/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tp_nd&source=em_20170622_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tp_nd")****
Derek --

Republicans thought they could work in secret to take away our health care and get away with it.

They're wrong.

Today, we're launching a brand new ad targeting Senate Republicans. **[Take a look, and then pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help us keep it on the air and keep holding Republicans accountable.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccf6/4067b0a/341610b62/7e681ac5/1172304663/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Take+a+look+and+then+pitch+in+3+or+whate&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tp_nd&source=em_20170622_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tp_nd")**

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccf6/4067b0a/341610b62/7e681ac2/1172304663/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Ad-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tp_nd&source=em_20170622_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tp_nd")
House Republicans voted to take health care away from 23 million Americans and decimate Medicaid -- and then rushed over to the White House to celebrate Donald Trump.

So we're shining a bright light on the Republican senators who want to do the same thing. Republicans can hide all they want, but we'll make sure their constituents know the facts.

We need grassroots supporters like you to help us keep the pressure on the GOP. Chip in $3 or whatever you can today so we can keep this ad running and get the word out about the GOP's health care repeal.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccf6/4067b0a/341610b62/7e681ac3/1172304663/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tp_nd&source=em_20170622_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccf6/4067b0a/341610b62/7e681ac0/1172304663/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tp_nd&source=em_20170622_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccf6/4067b0a/341610b62/7e681ac1/1172304663/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tp_nd&source=em_20170622_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ccf6/4067b0a/341610b62/7e681ace/1172304663/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/health-care-ad?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tp_nd&source=em_20170622_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tp_nd")

clean_body: We need your help to save affordable health care. Now that we've seen the Senate GOP's secret bill, we're launching a new ad to hold Republicans accountable on health care. Chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us keep it on the air and keep getting the word out about the GOP's health care repeal: ""** Derek -- Republicans thought they could work in secret to take away our health care and get away with it. They're wrong. Today, we're launching a brand new ad targeting Senate Republicans. "" "" House Republicans voted to take health care away from 23 million Americans and decimate Medicaid -- and then rushed over to the White House to celebrate Donald Trump. So we're shining a bright light on the Republican senators who want to do the same thing. Republicans can hide all they want, but we'll make sure their constituents know the facts. We need grassroots supporters like you to help us keep the pressure on the GOP. Chip in $3 or whatever you can today so we can keep this ad running and get the word out about the GOP's health care repeal. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" "" ** Thanks, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: The Senate just released their repeal bill
body:
We are the only thing standing in the way
#
Senate Republicans just released their draft bill to repeal health care for 23 million Americans, and as we expected the cuts will be devastating. Maternity care, emergency services, and mental health treatment will be slashed.
**[Our lives depend on our health care. Please call your senator and tell them to stop the so-called American Health Care Act in its tracks.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee4/3458951215/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170622-full")**
We are the only thing standing in the way of the worst, most deadly piece of legislation in our lifetimes. Call your senator and help stop this repeal.
--Shannon
**[CALL MY SENATOR»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee4/3458951215/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170622-full")**
* * *
Friends,
Republicans in the Senate want to keep the American people in limbo by keeping their version of the American Health Care Act secret. Right now, Mitch McConnell and his Senate colleagues are putting together a bill that could force people to go without necessary health care in order to give huge tax breaks to the insurance industry.
We deserve to know how much the Republican plan will increase our premiums, deductibles, and copayments, how many people will lose coverage, and what impact the $800 billion cut to Medicaid will have on those suffering from the ongoing opioid epidemic. We demand health care for those who lack coverage at this very moment, and the ones who might lose coverage due to pre-existing conditions.
The House passed their version of the so-called American Health Care Act without a score from the CBO, but we now know that 23 million people will lose coverage if it passes. That's not to mention the millions more who will be priced out of affording prescriptions and other vital components of health care, all so the very wealthiest can receive yet another tax cut. **[Call your senator today and tell them to stop the American Health Care Act. We need to start over with a plan that covers everybody.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee4/3458951215/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170622-full")**
We are fighting for universal coverage under a Medicare for All, single payer system that cuts the insurance industry out of the equation. In a single payer system, the monthly premium is the only time the patient is charged. Medical bankruptcy due to terminal illness would be a thing of the past, and the price gouging of the pharmaceutical industry would be stopped. It's time for the United States to join the UK, Canada, France, and every other major country--all of which guarantee healthcare as a right to all of their people.
Republicans in the Senate are beholden to the very industries that they are attempting to regulate. As a result, our health care access is in the hands of corporations who are looking to cash out every time a patient needs prenatal care, chemotherapy, and any other treatment.
Republicans want to take away health care from millions of people by passing the American Health Care Act. **[Please call your senator and tell them to stop their secret health care repeal and start over with a plan guaranteed to cover everybody.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee4/3458951215/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170622-full")**
We are getting closer than ever to achieving real universal coverage. A majority of the American people support universal coverage. While that opinion may not be reflected in the Senate, remember that they answer to us. **[Please call them today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee4/3458951215/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170622-full")**
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CALL MY SENATOR»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee4/3458951215/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170622-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee5/3458951215/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee2/3458951215/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0df3/43f17890/cc0ace67/62036ee3/3458951215/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: URGENT: health care update for dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde95/2a380d31/18ae68db/feae30/991791160/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde95/2a380d31/18ae68db/feae30/991791160/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team, we just got a first look at the bill Senate Republicans have been working on in secret, and it's even worse than we expected.
It defunds Planned Parenthood, makes even more cuts to Medicaid than the House bill, and undermines essential health benefits including maternity and prescription drug coverage.
In short, it would rip lifesaving care away from millions of our families, friends, and neighbors.
[**Add your name to tell the Senate NOT to pass this cruel bill and to protect access to the health care coverage millions of Americans rely on.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde95/2a380d31/18ae68db/feae31/991791160/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F201706_senate_healthcare")
We won't mince words: this bill would discriminate against women by allowing insurance companies to charge them more for their care, it would drive up premiums and out of pocket costs, and it would unfairly tax older Americans.
We can still stop this bill from passing the Senate, but only if each and every one of us step up to the plate.
**Team, the time to act is NOW.[Please, sign the petition and let the Senate know that you do NOT support this horrendous health care plan.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde95/2a380d31/18ae68db/feae31/991791160/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/tankthebill/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F201706_senate_healthcare")**
Lives are on the line here, everyone, so thank you for taking action.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde95/2a380d31/18ae68db/feae32/991791160/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA2X3NlbmF0ZV9oZWFsdGhjYXJlIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA2MjJfU2VuYXRlSGVhbHRoSkFfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201706_senate_healthcare?refcode=e20170622_SenateHealthJA_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde95/2a380d31/18ae68db/feae33/991791160/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

It defunds Planned Parenthood, makes even more cuts to Medicaid than the House bill, and undermines essential health benefits including maternity and prescription drug coverage. In short, it would rip lifesaving care away from millions of our families, friends, and neighbors. "" We won't mince words: this bill would discriminate against women by allowing insurance companies to charge them more for their care, it would drive up premiums and out of pocket costs, and it would unfairly tax older Americans. name: Tim Kaine
subject: I've seen enough, Derek - add your name if you have, too
body:
Say you're ready to elect Democrats. **Add your name if you're ready to elect Democrats -- we can't do this without you:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tk_nd&source=em_20170622_tk_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tk_nd")**
Derek --

I've seen what happens when the folks in charge in Washington aren't doing the job they were sent here to do. And now, with Donald Trump in the White House, things are about to get a whole lot worse.

President Trump has appointed some of the least qualified people in history to head executive departments and agencies, where they're already working to roll back the progress of the last eight years. He celebrated Republicans ramming through a disastrous health care repeal bill -- without any public hearings or debate.

Donald Trump is hard at work pushing his dangerous agenda -- taking steps to undo Wall Street reform, reject the science of climate change, and give millionaires and billionaires massive tax cuts at the expense of the middle class.

And all in just the first six months of this administration. Imagine the damage Donald Trump could do if left unchecked for the next three years.

**[Our first priority must be electing more Democrats to serve as an emergency brake against his agenda. But we have to join together to do it, Derek. No one can afford to sit this out.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Our+first+priority+must+be+electing+more&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tk_nd&source=em_20170622_tk_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tk_nd")**

You've always been there when we needed you most, so I'm asking you to step up again. **Say you're in to stand alongside the millions of Americans who are committed to electing more Democrats in 2017 and beyond:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tk_nd&source=em_20170622_tk_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tk_nd")**
Thanks,

Tim

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523307/4067b0a/34e759ce1/7e680017/2886766792/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tk_nd&source=em_20170622_tk_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tk_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523307/4067b0a/34e759ce1/7e680014/2886766792/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tk_nd&source=em_20170622_tk_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tk_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523307/4067b0a/34e759ce1/7e680015/2886766792/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tk_nd&source=em_20170622_tk_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tk_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523307/4067b0a/34e759ce1/7e680012/2886766792/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170622_tk_nd&source=em_20170622_tk_nd&refcode=em_20170622_tk_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: alert@dscc.org
subject: We've finally seen the health care bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The GOP just released their bill to repeal Obamacare. Fight back before the vote.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170622-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

The GOP just released their bill to repeal Obamacare -- and now we're racing against the clock to stop this disaster of a bill from passing.

**Mitch McConnell is planning to move this bill to the floor for a final vote by the end of next week. That 's right -- no public hearings, no amendments, nothing. He wants to ram this bill through the Senate as quickly as he can.**

[**This is the moment when your support matters most. Chip in $1 right now to help ramp up our ads and fund all our efforts to stop repeal and save Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170622-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

This is our biggest fight yet. Republicans are hell-bent on passing a bill by the end of this month -- even if it means passing it with just 50 votes and Mike Pence as the tie breaker. And once that happens, all the progress we secured with Obamacare will end with the stroke of Donald Trump's pen.

The health and well-being of millions of Americans is on the line right now and Senate Democrats are fighting with every fiber of their being to stop this bill.

**We need to have their backs and show Republicans we won 't let them get away with rushing through this catastrophic repeal bill. Chip in $1 right now to help turn up the pressure on Republicans not to repeal Obamacare:**

[**http://dscc.org/stand-up-to-save-obamacare**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170622-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

We can defeat this bill, but it's going to take all of us fighting back as hard as we can right now.

Thanks for stepping up,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e5bc/2b07114c/20211582/7310ebad/2962142136/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e5bc/2b07114c/20211582/7310ebac/2962142136/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e5bc/2b07114c/20211582/7310ebaf/2962142136/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: The GOP just released their bill to repeal Obamacare. Fight back before the vote. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Team, The GOP just released their bill to repeal Obamacare -- and now we're racing against the clock to stop this disaster of a bill from passing. Mitch McConnell is planning to move this bill to the floor for a final vote by the end of next week. That 's right -- no public hearings, no amendments, nothing. He wants to ram this bill through the Senate as quickly as he can. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" This is our biggest fight yet. Republicans are hell-bent on passing a bill by the end of this month -- even if it means passing it with just 50 votes and Mike Pence as the tie breaker. And once that happens, all the progress we secured with Obamacare will end with the stroke of Donald Trump's pen. The health and well-being of millions of Americans is on the line right now and Senate Democrats are fighting with every fiber of their being to stop this bill. We need to have their backs and show Republicans we won 't let them get away with rushing through this catastrophic repeal bill. Chip in $1 right now to help turn up the pressure on Republicans not to repeal Obamacare: "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" We can defeat this bill, but it's going to take all of us fighting back as hard as we can right now. name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: Still time for the Cheddarbomb
body:
This is an important opportunity to support someone on the front lines of the fight for democratic legitimacy.
Right now, during the greatest legitimacy crisis our government has ever seen, is precisely the time to do this. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b213/1215896348/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_baldwin?refcode=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2") Friend, I hope you saw our message this morning about Tammy Baldwin's Cheddarbomb. This is an important opportunity to support someone on the front lines of the fight for our democratic legitimacy, and there's still a few hours left to make your contribution. [**_Contribute $3 now to help meet Tammy Baldwin 's $30,000 Cheddarbomb goal by midnight tonight._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b210/1215896348/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_baldwin?refcode=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+3+now+to+help+meet+Tammy+Bald&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2") Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today, Russ Feingold \------Original Message------
From: LegitPAC Team
Subject: TODAY: Fierce defender of legitimacy Friend, Tammy Baldwin has been one of the fiercest defenders of our democratic legitimacy in the Senate this cycle. And she's got something big going on today. Senator Baldwin fought tenaciously against confirming Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court after Barack Obama -- and the majority of voters who elected him -- were denied the rightful opportunity to fill that seat. She's fighting for lower drug prices, for Buy American rules, and lots of other priorities that faithfully reflect the needs of the voters that elected her. But shadowy out-of-state attack groups are fighting to deny Wisconsin voters an equal say in Senator Baldwin's reelection campaign. By one count, 85% of all nationwide third party attacks on Senate candidates have targeted Baldwin this year. [**_Help supporters across the country combat these attacks designed to delegitimize Tammy Baldwin. Contribute $3 to today 's special, one-day "Cheddarbomb" to reach $30,000 in one day._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b211/1215896348/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_baldwin?refcode=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Help+supporters+across+the+country+comba&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2") A Cheddarbomb is a special type of "moneybomb" event where people throughout the country who support a good Wisconsin Democrat like Tammy Baldwin all come together to make contributions on the same day. By driving up a one-day fundraising total for Senator Baldwin, we'll make a powerful statement. Despite all the outside money pouring in to attack Senator Baldwin and drown out the legitimate voices of everyday Americans, we'll show that we are strong and we are loud when we work together. To maximize the power of this statement, we need to reach at least $30,000 today -- and to reach that goal, everyone needs to chip in. [**_Contribute $3 to reach $30,000 in one day and make a powerful statement about our power when we come together._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b20e/1215896348/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_baldwin?refcode=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+Contribute+3+to+reach+30000+in+one+day+a&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2") Thank you for standing up to support Senator Baldwin today, LegitPAC Team | [CONTRIBUTE ](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b20f/1215896348/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_baldwin?refcode=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=5+-+CONTRIBUTE+&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b20c/1215896348/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b20d/1215896348/VEsB/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=7+-+Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2"). | Authorized and paid for by LegitPAC
---
All content (C) 2017 LegitPAC, All Rights Reserved PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562

[Privacy Policy](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46e5/1c469400/3a321ac/354b20a/1215896348/VEsO/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/content/legitpac-privacy-policy/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=8+-+Privacy+Policy&utm_campaign=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2&source=20170622_Cheddarbomb_msg_2")
